verifier_packages.description: Passes when target reports text content.
verifier_packages.verify_py:
import json
import os
import sys

request = json.load(sys.stdin)
verifier_id = request["verifier"]["id"]
inputs = request.get("inputs") or {}

def fail(code, message):
    print(json.dumps({"passed": False, "error": {"code": code, "message": message}}))
    sys.exit(0)

def passed(content):
    print(json.dumps({
        "passed": True,
        "evidence": [{"id": verifier_id, "type": verifier_id, "content": content}],
        "outputs": content,
    }))
    sys.exit(0)

target = inputs.get("target")
with open(target, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
    content = handle.read().lower()
if "text" not in content and "ascii" not in content and "utf-8" not in content:
    fail("file_type_mismatch", "target does not report text content")
passed({"target": target})

candidates.description: Detect and report a file's content type as text.
